# @rds-vue-ui/button-play-apollo

A Simple Play Button.

## Install

### Using yarn

`yarn add --registry=https://npm.edpl.us @rds-vue-ui/button-play-apollo`

## Usage

`import { ButtonPlayApollo } from "@rds-vue-ui/button-play-apollo"`

**Note:** Please note that we assume that you have `@rds-vue-ui/rds-theme-base` installed as a dependency to your vue-based project and have included `@rds-vue-ui/rds-theme-base` in the `main.js` or main file of vue-based application.

## Props API

| Prop                | Type    | Required / Optional | Default  | Description                                                            |
| ------------------- | ------- | ------------------- | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| button-text         | String  | optional            | `null`   | The text to display inside the button.                                 |
| button-text-size    | String  | required            | `null`   | The size of the button text. Default "medium"                          |
| button-text-variant | String  | required            | `dark-3` | Color variant of the button text (e.g., "primary", "secondary", etc.). |
| background-variant  | String  | required            | `dark-1` | Color variant of the background (e.g., "primary", "secondary", etc.).  |
| disabled            | Boolean | optional            | false    | Disables the button .Default: false.                                   |

## Events API

| Event       | Type       | Usage                     |
| ----------- | ---------- | ------------------------- |
| `cta-click` | `()=>void` | Emitted when cta clicked. |

## Versioning

We use [SemVer](http://semver.org/) for versioning.
